meanings.definition: a checkerboard game for two players who each have 12 pieces; the object is to jump over and so capture the opponent's pieces
a serving of drink (usually alcoholic) drawn from a keg

examples: he finished it at a single gulp

meanings.definition: a current of air (usually coming into a chimney or room or vehicle)
the depth of a vessel's keel below the surface (especially when loaded)
the act of moving a load by drawing or pulling
